name: Friendship Cake - 30 Day Cake
recipeIngredient: 20 tablespoons diced red and green maraschino cherries (use both)
1 large can chunk pineapple with juice
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine 20 tablespoons starter juice, 20 tablespoons sugar, and 4 large cans of sliced peaches, drained.
2. Stir daily for 10 days.
3. On the tenth day, add 20 tablespoons sugar and 4 large cans of chunk pineapple with juice.
4. Mix all ingredients thoroughly.
5. Bake in a greased bundt pan at 300°F (150°C) for 1 hour.
6. Serve plain once cooled. Optionally, pour about 1-1.5 oz of rum over it to add flavor.
